teachingPoint: T173 QueryExecutionEngine three-layer security gate order is MANDATORY AND IMMUTABLE: T187 quota (INLINE, layer 1) → F422 RLS (layer 2) → F423 PII masking (layer 3) → executeQuery. Any reordering is a BUILD_FAILURE.
keywords: three layer gate order T187 quota inline F422 RLS F423 PII masking mandatory immutable warehouse query execution platform-only canBeDisabled false
ironRules: GATE ORDER IS MANDATORY: T187 quota (INLINE, layer 1) → F422 RLS (layer 2) → F423 PII masking (layer 3) → executeQuery
T187 QuotaManager is INLINE — instantiated in T173 constructor, NOT @Inject()-ed. F426 does NOT exist.
F422 IRowLevelSecurityService is PLATFORM-ONLY — tenant cannot disable (canBeDisabled: false)
F423 IPIIMaskingService runs BEFORE result serialization — no skipMasking opt-out
Any reordering of the three layers is a BUILD_FAILURE
